_schema.description: Humanitarian program performance metrics for bullet graph visualization

fields.label: string — metric name displayed as the row label
fields.unit: string — unit appended to values, e.g. '%' or ' pts'
fields.value: number — featured measure (actual performance this period)
fields.target: number — comparative measure (target / goal marker line)
fields.ranges: array [poor_end, sat_end, good_end] — cumulative thresholds for qualitative bands
fields.rangeLabels: array of 3 strings — labels for each band: poor, satisfactory, good

_schema.replace: Swap value and target for real figures. Adjust range thresholds to match your org's performance definitions. All values should share the same unit within a chart.
